# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- After completing implementation tasks for DotNetCloud phases, update the corresponding checkboxes in docs/IMPLEMENTATION_CHECKLIST.md to reflect progress. Each phase section has a checklist of tasks with [ ] that should be marked as [x] when complete.
- After completing any phase step, update docs/MASTER_PROJECT_PLAN.md to reflect the new status and progress. Update the Quick Status Summary table and the specific step details with completed deliverables and notes.
